title: problem with connecting a slice of a struct array to a port

features.name: packed struct array slice to port connection
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type, a module with an unpacked array of that struct as output port, and a parent module instantiating the child with a slice of a struct array connected to the port

features.name: struct array slice assignment from intermediate signal
features.description: Code should include a packed struct array assignment pattern where an intermediate signal is used to pass struct array slices between modules
